creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
Yes, I approve this
Sorry for not-automatical replay, because I do not receive email,
because email in the Makefile was incorrect, it's my first port...

Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>:
> Maintainer of devel/ioncube,
> Please note that PR ports/144961 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144961
